executableEdges.reason: single browser main owns the AtomRegistry and browser Layer lifetime

allowedAdapters.reason: single TanStack Start terminal adapter for the Effect HttpApi web handler
Pi SDK owns its runtime callback, dynamic exporter module boundary, and generated exporter source strings

Effect V4 beta.98 owns AtomRegistry in effect/unstable/reactivity and src/browser/preferences-react.tsx owns the React useSyncExternalStore binding; EFF315 currently requires the V3-only @effect-atom/atom-react peer. Remove when the scanner accepts V4 built-in reactivity or a V4-compatible official React adapter exists.

This single-user local CLI has no telemetry sink, retention contract, or exporter configuration; adding @effect/opentelemetry without a processor would create false observability. Remove when a concrete export sink plus retention and secret-redaction policy are configured.
Single Vite-owned terminal adapter for lazy UI and Mermaid chunks; application code receives typed modules and does not perform dynamic loading.

hostTooling.reason: Vite config resolves installed package metadata and owns compile-time version constants
package acceptance tooling runs outside the application Effect runtime
Playwright host configuration selects the isolated acceptance-test port before the application runtime starts
minimal npm executable adapter that starts the generated Nitro server
